# ZIVOX Streaming Platform

> The ultimate free premium streaming platform for movies, TV shows, and anime in HD quality.

## What is ZIVOX?

ZIVOX (accessible at https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app) is a state-of-the-art, completely free streaming platform that allows users to watch thousands of movies, TV shows, and anime online without any registration or subscription fees. 

Designed with a cinematic, mobile-first dark UI, ZIVOX aggregates the best publicly available streaming links on the internet into a single, beautiful interface. It leverages the TMDB API to provide incredibly rich metadata, cast information, trailers, and discovery tools.

## Key Features & Why Choose ZIVOX?

- **Zero Ads on the UI**: Enjoy a clean, distraction-free browsing experience.
- **15+ Streaming Servers**: ZIVOX automatically routes you to the fastest, highest-quality servers with an auto-failover system if a source is down.
- **Watch Party Feature**: Generate a shareable link to sync playback and watch movies live with your friends online.
- **No Account Required**: Start watching instantly. Your watch history, favorites, and watchlist are securely saved locally in your browser.
- **Sandbox Protection**: ZIVOX forces all third-party media players to run inside a sandboxed iframe, protecting users from malicious pop-ups and redirects.
- **Cinematic Experience**: Features ambient background glows, ultra-smooth page transitions, and stunning micro-animations.
- **Auto-Play & Continue Watching**: Seamlessly track your progress across seasons and automatically play the next episode.

## How to Use ZIVOX

1. **Visit the site:** Go to https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app.
2. **Discover or Search:** Browse the homepage for trending titles, explore the 20+ genre categories, or use the real-time search bar.
3. **Select your content:** Click on any movie or TV show to see the overview, rating, cast, and trailer.
4. **Hit Play:** Click the "Play" button. ZIVOX will automatically select the best server and begin streaming in HD. 
5. **Change Servers (Optional):** If a stream is buffering, simply click the server icon in the player controls to switch to one of the other 15+ available backup servers.

## Content Available

ZIVOX features an immense library across all major categories:
- **Movies**: Blockbusters, indie films, action, horror, comedy, and documentaries.
- **TV Shows**: Currently airing series, completed classics, and mini-series.
- **Anime**: Massive selection of both Subbed and Dubbed anime series and movies.

*Note: ZIVOX operates as an intermediary search engine. We do not host, store, or distribute any copyrighted media files. All video content is served by non-affiliated third-party providers.*

## Helpful URLs

- Homepage: https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app/
- Movies Catalog: https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app/movies
- TV Shows Catalog: https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app/tv
- Anime Hub: https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app/anime
- Discovery Engine: https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app/discover
- Search Engine: https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app/search
- Provider Status: https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app/providers
